title: caltha membranacea f. erecta
intro: Caltha membranacea f. erecta, also known as the yellow marsh marigold, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the buttercup family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. In herbal preparations, the roots and rhizomes of the yellow marsh marigold are used to make infusions and tinctures that can be used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of the yellow marsh marigold include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce pain and inflammation, and promote overall well-being.
